head-description: Bludit is a web application to build your own website or blog in seconds. It's free, open source, and supports Markdown.
bludit-slogan1: Create your own Website or Blog in seconds
bludit-feature1: Bludit uses files in JSON format to store the content, so you don't need to install or configure a database.
bludit-feature2: Customize your Bludit-powered site with beautiful themes. You can download themes from the official site.
bludit-feature3: Extend Bludit's functionality with amazing plugins. You can download plugins from the official site.
bludit-feature4: Bludit includes built-in SEO tools to improve your ranking across search engines.
bludit-feature5: Bludit supports Markdown and HTML for content, and provides both a Markdown editor and a WYSIWYG editor.
bludit-feature6: Bludit is privacy-first and doesn't track visitors.
bludit-documentation: Read our documentation for requirements, installation guides, how-to's, and more.
bludit-support: Need help? Reach us in the forum or on GitHub issues.
